title: Orthodontists
description: Examine, diagnose, and treat dental malocclusions and oral cavity anomalies. Design and fabricate appliances to realign teeth and jaws to produce and maintain normal function and to improve appearance.

tasks.text: Diagnose teeth and jaw or other dental-facial abnormalities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine patients to assess abnormalities of jaw development, tooth position, and other dental-facial structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study diagnostic records, such as medical or dental histories, plaster models of the teeth, photos of a patient's face and teeth, and X-rays, to develop patient treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fit dental appliances in patients' mouths to alter the position and relationship of teeth and jaws or to realign teeth.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust dental appliances to produce and maintain normal function.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide patients with proposed treatment plans and cost estimates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise patients to comply with treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct dental officers and technical assistants in orthodontic procedures and techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate orthodontic services with other dental and medical services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and fabricate appliances, such as space maintainers, retainers, and labial and lingual arch wires.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
